patterns.problem: Repeated clicks on the generate button created multiple image generation requests.
patterns.root_cause: The generate button was only disabled after the fetch resolved enough to confirm the request was in-flight, leaving a window where multiple clicks could dispatch multiple requests.
patterns.solution: Lock the generate handler and disable the button immediately before sending the request; remove redundant re-binding of the click handler during history renders.
patterns.why_it_works: Disabling the button before the network call closes the click window entirely, and removing rebinds prevents multiple handlers from being attached over time.
